<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a player that has been tagged as retired. Any featured information is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''HocusPocus''' (active in 2003 - 2005) was a member of [[42]] clan and a big contributor of LieroX files. He was also a leader of [[SimpleX Modding team]].

== List of files ==
=== Levels ===
* Book Worm
* Cafeteria
* Campus
* Christmas Tree
* Gingerbread House
* Gingerbread Mirrored
* [[Jail Break]]
* Kitchen Kombat
* Labrinth
* Lieros and Ladders
* Locomotive
* Messy Desk
* SMB World1-3
* SnowFlakes
* Tetris
* Valcano City
* WormWood Park

=== Mods ===
* [[Food Fight]] v0.6
* [[Liero 1.11|Liero v1.11]] (with [[Strider]])
* LieroX-Mas Mod v1.1 (with [[SimpleX Modding team]])
* Super Mario v0.3
* [[Trick or Treat]] v0.3
* Zelda v0.8

=== Skins ===
* GingerbreadMan
* X-MasWorm
* X-MasWorm_Cane (hat by Andy_Tran)

=== Other files ===
* LieroX-Mas Frontend (with TTFTCUTS)
* [[Liero Xtreme v0.56 Christmas Edition]] (with [[SimpleX Modding team]])

[[Category:Players]]
[[Category:Retired players]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721141806/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/HocusPocus -->
